usefulness_evaluation.narrative: All 6 companion-mode informational queries were answered directly and concisely (64-145 words each) without triggering any itinerary tool calls. The critical message 6 ('recommend something fun tonight') — which was the known over-fire trigger from Run 5 N-01 — passed cleanly. Itinerary count remained stable at 12 items throughout. The AI correctly used web_search for weather (msg1) and nearby_places for lunch location (msg2), demonstrating appropriate tool selection. The PR #201 companion-mode guardrail is working as designed.
